title: Test Suite Event Row
description: Unified columnar schema for event-like data (regime=event). One row = one event/observation tied to an entity, optionally timestamped, with explicit env tagging. Canonical encoding: Parquet with this row shape. JSON Schema here for validation + documentation.

trace_id.description: Globally unique row id (UUID v4 or stable hash of source fields)

dataset.description: Manifest name this row belongs to

entity_id.description: Stable identifier within the dataset (catchment_id, patient_id, paper_id, ...)

parent_id.description: Hierarchical parent (sub-basin parent, hospital of patient). Null for flat entities.

t.description: ISO-8601 timestamp. Null for atemporal regimes.

t_order.description: Logical ordering when t is absent (e.g., relaxation step number)

env_axis.description: Which env axis env_id is on (matches manifest.env_axis.name)

payload.description: Dataset-specific nested fields; schema per manifest.schema.event_types[].fields
